creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 204779
burp-devel - update to 2.3.8

Update to 2.3.8.
Changelog can be found here: https://burp.grke.org/changelog.html

This update depends on PR #238288 which modifies sysutils/burp port (burp is a masterport for burp-devel): that PR makes possibile to avoid having a pkg-plist file for burp-devel.

Tested successfully on {11.2,12.0}-RELEASE {i386,amd64}.
